title: Extension Autoloading Error
description:
I am using DuckDB in Java as a file DB 
when using the extensions to read files like Excel and Parquet
I get the following error when sending multiple requests at same time


Caused by: java.sql.SQLException: Extension Autoloading Error: An error occurred while trying to automatically install the required extension 'excel':
Initialization function "excel_init" from file "/home/grim/.duckdb/extensions/v1.2.2/linux_amd64/excel.duckdb_extension" threw an exception: "Failed to add new function overloads to function "read_xlsx": function already exists"
	at org.duckdb.DuckDBNative.duckdb_jdbc_prepare(Native Method) ~[duckdb_jdbc-1.2.2.0.jar:?]
	at org.duckdb.DuckDBPreparedStatement.prepare(DuckDBPreparedStatement.java:115) ~[duckdb_jdbc-1.2.2.0.jar:?]
	at org.duckdb.DuckDBPreparedStatement.<init>(DuckDBPreparedStatement.java:75) ~[duckdb_jdbc-1.2.2.0.jar:?]
	at org.duckdb.DuckDBConnection.prepareStatement(DuckDBConnection.java:80) ~[duckdb_jdbc-1.2.2.0.jar:?]
	at org.duckdb.DuckDBConnection.prepareStatement(DuckDBConnection.java:192) ~[duckdb_jdbc-1.2.2.0.jar:?]
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value Float64, description String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 1234567.897, 'Test entry 1');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, description) VALUES (2, NULL, 'Test entry 2');
SELECT formatDateTime(value, '%H:%M %p') AS formatted_time FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS non_null_count FROM test_data;
key_bug_features: Concurrent requests trigger extension autoloading error
